hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=(i.tool_input&&(i.tool_input.file_path||i.tool_input.path))||'';if(/(^|\/)ecc\//.test(f)){console.error('[guard] BLOCKIERT: ecc/ ist vendored ECC-Core (Schicht 1) — unberuehrt lassen. Aenderungen ueber bestpractice-extras/ (Schicht 2).');process.exit(2)}process.stdout.write(d)}catch(e){process.stdout.write(d)}})"
